sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94112" key="sikuasth/rion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῐκυ-αστήριον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n94112.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cupping-instrument</tr_>, prob. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σηκυιαστήριον</foreign> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Zonar.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
